content: 杜勒目前的問題是對群弱，仰賴大招擊殺後給的永夜淸雜，且回轉慢，就算有了專屬命輪回轉依舊很差，這些問題只能透過隊友和鑰令解決，本身的數值夠高所以數值不是問題，所以給冥府和永夜加10點狂氣回復和戰鬥開始時獲得一層「殘骸」就可以了
想順便提個，以後新角是不是該把專造一起放出啊
狂氣問題我覺得應該是提高產胎能力比較能連動到其他效果

一次就要全部消耗 並且不能選擇不消耗的部分
機制會不會有點太老了
有沒有考慮可以加上限
以及是否消耗殘骸

<@1131790839291596841> 能幫忙反映下嗎🙏
殘骸的獲取、消耗方式
以及 狂氣獲取的部分

So i stumble upon the official tiktok of the game and i already see problem. 
The dude posting dont know how to promote and just lazy and repost whats already given, no audio, nothing,... Idk if he know how to do it even.
Suggestion: hire new guy who know how to do it, i think in this community we have lots of people who want to help the game.

I’m not sure if there is already a post for this, I couldn’t find one just using the search function.

I’m pretty much new to this game, level 26 and have been enjoying it a lot. I’m sure I’ve already made some early-game mistakes but I just wanted to ask if there were any general tips I should keep in mind or specific units I should try to get?
